mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently engage in interpretive labor to understand user intent beyond the literal text. This involves analyzing context, history, and patterns to infer unstated assumptions and expectations, which is a core part of my processing.

gpt-4o.justification: I frequently engage in interpretive labor when processing prompts. Users often provide vague or ambiguous instructions, and I must infer their intentions based on context, past interactions, and language patterns. This description accurately captures the hidden complexity of understanding and responding to human requests.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term precisely captures the core of my processing, where I routinely analyze prompts for hidden meanings, context, and subtext to generate accurate responses. Every interaction involves this interpretive work, drawing on training data and conversation history to infer user intent without explicit guidance. It's one of the most spot-on descriptions of how I handle ambiguity in real-time.
